creator: mb@levais.imp.ch
text:
A installation on this server went ok, but after reboot I had this
stacktrace on the screen:

int=0000000d  err=00000000  efl=00010212  eip=00005c16
eax=00035500  ebx=00002710  ecx=ffffffff  edx=000355b4
esi=0001b454  edi=0001b454  ebp=00035560  esp=0003554c
cs=002b     ds=0033     fs=0033     gs=0033    ss=0033
cs:eip=f2 ae 89 ca f7 d2 4a 89-55 f8 89 75 fc 0f b6 45
ss:esp=10 27 00 00 00 00 00 00-00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00
BTX halted

Note:

With 4.3 RELEASE this doesn't happen and works perfectly
for all cases. I tested it 2 times with 4.3 RELEASE and
it worked.

How-To-Repeat: 
Install 4.4 on a really big disk. It makes no difference
how big the root slice is.
